results.rendered_html:
sam-ā-√sañj P. -sajati, to fasten or stick together, join or attach to, fix or place on, wrap or suspend round,  MBh. ;  Hariv. ;
to impose, resign or deliver over to (loc.),  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Pass. -sajyate, or -sajjate, to cling or adhere closely together, cling or stick to, become attached to,  MW.
